description: The GenericUserspaceDialogSpawner only works in dash space. The Generic type it takes has to be a component type. This component activates when on the slot as a button. When activated, this component attaches a new instance of T to the world, triggers ``Initializer`` with the new Component as an argument, and then positions it in front of the user in dash space. It needs a ModalOverlayManager above it in order to work.

fields.Initializer: An action that takes a Component type.
